improvements.description: No issues found. Clean implementation with proper JSDoc, DR1-001/DR1-002/DR1-003 all satisfied.
No issues found. SandboxLevel imported (DR1-001), confirm dialog present (DR4-002), no console.log, no unused imports.
HTML branch correctly placed after isVideo and before md (DR3-005). Dynamic import with loading spinner. No issues found.
codeViewData guard includes content.isHtml (DR2-002). HtmlPreviewMobile with confirm dialog (DR4-002). No issues found.
HTML size pre-check with HTML_MAX_SIZE_BYTES before readFileContent (DR4-004). isHtml flag spread correctly.
Comprehensive test coverage: HTML_EXTENSIONS, HTML_MAX_SIZE_BYTES, isHtmlExtension (case sensitivity, dot handling, edge cases), SANDBOX_ATTRIBUTES (DR1-003 YAGNI), SandboxLevel type.

checklist_results.note: No console.log found in any target files
All imports are used. ESLint confirms zero warnings.
No any types in target files. TypeScript strict mode passes.
JSDoc comments present with Issue references and DR references.

checklist_results.item: DR1-001: SandboxLevel type defined in html-extensions.ts, imported in HtmlPreview.tsx
checklist_results.note: Type exported from html-extensions.ts line 45, imported in HtmlPreview.tsx line 19 and FileViewer.tsx line 26.
normalizeExtension imported from image-extensions.ts and used in isHtmlExtension.

checklist_results.item: DR1-003: SANDBOX_ATTRIBUTES has 2 entries only (no full)
checklist_results.note: Only safe and interactive entries. Test explicitly verifies no full key.

checklist_results.item: DR4-002: Interactive mode requires confirm dialog
checklist_results.note: window.confirm in HtmlPreview.tsx line 133 and FileViewer.tsx line 58. Confirmed files tracked via Set ref.
next.config.js line 66: frame-src 'self' with comment referencing DR4-007.

checklist_results.item: DR2-002: FileViewer.tsx codeViewData guard includes isHtml
checklist_results.note: FileViewer.tsx line 378: content.isHtml in guard condition prevents double rendering.

message: All target files passed quality checks. No refactoring needed - code is clean with proper type safety, no console.log residue, no unused imports, and all design policy checklist items (DR1-001 through DR4-007) are satisfied. All 4956 tests pass, 0 TypeScript errors, 0 ESLint errors.
